ticket.subject: CRITICAL: Database credentials exposed in Docker image registry
ticket.body: Our DevOps team discovered that production database credentials were hardcoded in a Docker image that was pushed to Docker Hub as public 4 hours ago. Although we've since deleted the image, it was already pulled multiple times. We need immediate credential rotation for the affected database user and a complete audit of all connection attempts since the push timestamp. Please treat this as an active security incident.
